After weeks of speculation, the Canadiens chose winger Juraj Slafkovsky, leaving centre Shane Wright to fall to fourth overall to Seattle:

Redblacks vs Roughriders Week 5 Picks and Predictions: Ottawa Dealt Another Rough Hand   The Ottawa Redblacks face off against the Saskatchewan Roughriders in Week 5 of CFL action on Friday night. The Redblacks are still looking for their first win of the year and it won’t come easy at Mosaic Stadium.

Rafael Nadal vs Nick Kyrgios Picks: It's Kyrgios' Time to Shine   Nick Kyrgios is appearing in his first Grand Slam semifinal and is the favorite against Rafael Nadal, who is struggling to come to terms with an abdomen injury that flared up in his quarterfinal victory.

Novak Djokovic vs Cameron Norrie Picks: First-Time Semifinalist Seeks to Dethrone King   The contrasting tale of champion vs. contender plays out Friday on Centre Court, as Novak Djokovic and Cameron Norrie battle for a place in the Wimbledon final.

2022 NHL Draft Odds and Prop Picks: Slafkovsky Goes Right After Wright   The 2022 NHL Draft is here and several teams are looking to find a player who can provide immediate help in the upcoming season. The draft is a very exciting day for players, front offices, and fan bases, but it also comes with a ton of pressure.

True Crime Byline: How one childhood incident pushed Dawn Crey into a downward spiral from which she would never escape   The new podcast True Crime Byline looks back at The Vancouver Sun investigation into Vancouver's missing women, a case that eventually led to the arrest and conviction of Robert Pickton. This profile of missing woman Dawn Crey was part of a series of investigative stories published in 2001.

True Crime Byline: A Politician Murdered his Ex Wife. We Should Have Seen it Coming   Looking back on the murder of JoAnn Wilson today, what's most surprising is that we were surprised it happened at all.

Douglas Todd: Canadian cops far less likely to kill, or be killed, than U.S. counterparts   Analysis: Canadian police are often accused of using excessive force, but a U.S. officer is five times more likely than a Canadian cop to shoot and kill.
HAVE YOUR SAY: Answer our daily Toronto Sun poll question

EDITORIAL: Liberal nobodies cower before Trudeau   Boris Johnson is stepping down as British prime minister because his own Conservative party — dozens of cabinet ministers and Members of Parliament — publicly revolted against his unethical conduct.

GOLDSTEIN: Freeland’s absurd claim ‘climate action’ insures against high energy prices   Finance Minister Chrystia Freeland was being insensitive when she told Canadians high gasoline prices are a reminder “of why climate action is so important and why as a country we have to work even harder and move even faster towards a green economy.”

James Caan, star of The Godfather, Elf, dies at 82   James Caan, the curly-haired tough guy known to movie fans as the hotheaded Sonny Corleone of “The Godfather” and to television audiences as both the dying football player in the classic weeper “Brian’s Song” and the casino boss in “Las Vegas,” has died. He was 82.

Sacha Baron Cohen defeats defamation suit filed by Roy Moore   An appeals court on Thursday rejected a $95 million defamation lawsuit against Comedian Sacha Baron Cohen filed by former Alabama Supreme Court Chief Justice Roy Moore, who said he was tricked into a television appearance that lampooned sexual misconduct accusations against him.

Norwegian Cruise scraps COVID testing for select voyages   Passengers boarding Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings ships won’t have to take COVID-19 tests from next month unless required by local law, the U.S. cruise operator said on Wednesday as the crucial summer sailing season gathers steam.

RAYS OF SUNSHINE: Our Top 5 SUNshine Girls for June 2022   WATCH as we highlight our Top 5 SUNshine Girls for the month of June 2022!

SUNshine Girl Erin   SUNshine Girl Erin loves cosy Italian cars and rap and R&B artists. The 5-foot-10, Sagittarius spends her downtime perusing through Instagram or hitting the club. (Ernest Doroszuk/Toronto Sun)

SUNshine Girl Shelby   SUNshine Girl Shelby, a 5-foot-3, brown-eyed Taurus, loves to play with her dogs. She's a big fan of Taylor Swift and also loves to sing, dance and play volleyball. (Toronto Sun/Postmedia Network)
SUNshine Girl Ally   SUNshine Girl Ally is a 5-foot-4 blue-eyed Libra. She loves to golf and listen to the Deftones, Motley Crue and Def Leppard. (Toronto Sun/Postmedia Network)
